records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. 'ichqy`s, -y`os, a fish + say^ros a lizard.]

defs: An extinct genus of marine reptiles; -- so named from their short, biconcave vertebræ, resembling those of fishes. Several species, varying in length from ten to thirty feet, are known from the Liassic, Oölitic, and Cretaceous formations.
